calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Continued To Jul-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Byron G. Sun for Michael Black, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Bruce Feder for Jewish Family and Children's Services, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court and Mr. Feder confirmed that Jewish Family and Children's Services is withdrawing their petition and any objections to Mr. Black's petition.

The court took Mr. Black's petition under submission and took Jewish Family and Children's Services' petition off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Continued To Apr-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Bruce Feder, for Jewish Family and Children's Services, Petitioner.
Byron Sun, for Michael Black, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court confirms with Mr. Feder that his client will not be contesting the competing petition. The court advises that it intends to continue the instant petition to Apr-22-2025 to be heard with Mr. Black's petition. No objection to the preceding is presented. The court confirms with Mr. Feder that he intends to submit to the court a proposed order to extend his client's Letters of Special Administration to Apr-22-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
